headline: What to Expect From Philip Morris' Q2 2026 Earnings Report
summary: Philip Morris is expected to announce its second-quarter earnings in July, and Wall Street expects the company’s EPS to increase by a single-digit percentage.

headline: Philip Morris International and Maestro Andrea Bocelli Present "Believe. Further"
summary: STAMFORD, CT, June 29, 2026--Philip Morris International (PMI) (NYSE: PM) and Maestro Andrea Bocelli today presented "Believe. Further", a multi-year platform designed to engage audiences in a broader conversation on progress and positive change. The launch took place at the Torre dell’Arsenale in Venice, where heritage and forward movement meet, a fitting setting for two voices on a similar path.
